author: linonetwo
description: Track preset plugin feature usage in TidGi Desktop default wiki via TidGi IPC analytics bridge
name: default-template-usage-analytics
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/linonetwo/default-template-usage-analytics/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/default-template-usage-analytics/readme","text":"!! Default Template Usage Analytics

Automatically tracks coarse feature usage in the TidGi Desktop default wiki without any configuration.

!! How to disable

Open TidGi analytics preferences and turn off analytics, or uninstall this plugin.

<$button onclick="void $tw.tidgi?.service?.window?.open('preferences',{preferenceGotoTab:'privacy'})">Open TidGi Privacy & Analytics Settings</$button>

!! What is tracked

;`startup` (once on boot)
: Which plugins are installed (one boolean per plugin key) + `plugin_count`. Plugin list is dynamically enumerated from the live wiki.

;`tiddler_created` / `tiddler_saved` / `tiddler_deleted`
: Fired immediately on each operation. No title or content is included.

;`search_performed`
: Fired on each search. No query text is included.

;`layout_used`
: Fired each time the layout changes. Property `layout_plugin` contains the owning plugin slug (e.g. `linonetwo_simple_layout_launcher`).

;`feature_used` (once per feature per session)
: Property `feature` is one of: `command_palette`, `calendar`, `whiteboard`, `todolist`, `favorites`.

;`active` (every 5 minutes when there is activity)
: Heartbeat for engagement time estimation. Replaces `beforeunload` which Electron does not fire reliably on shutdown.

;`wiki_stats` (once, 8-12 minutes after boot, computed in Node.js worker)
: `user_tiddler_count`, `size_total_chars`, `size_mean_chars`, `size_median_chars`, `size_max_chars`, `size_top10_mean`, `plugin_count`. No tiddler titles or content.

!! Privacy

* No tiddler titles, note content, file paths, URLs, or any user-generated text is ever included.
* All events pass through TidGi main-process privacy filter before delivery.
* Outside TidGi Desktop the plugin does nothing silently."},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/default-template-usage-analytics/startup.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/default-template-usage-analytics/startup.js","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"startup","Modern.TiddlyDev#Origin":"index.ts","text":""use strict";var t=/^\$:\/plugins\/([^/]+\/[^/]+)/.exec(e);return t?t[1].toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,"_").slice(0,40):pluginTitleToKey(e)};exports.name="default-template-usage-analytics-browser",exports.platforms=["browser"],exports.after=["startup"],exports.synchronous=!0,exports.startup=()=>{var i=$tw.tidgi?.service?.analytics;if(i?.trackPluginEvent){const s=i.trackPluginEvent.bind(i),r={};let a=0;$tw.wiki.each((e,t)=>{t.startsWith("$:/plugins/")&&"plugin"===e.fields["plugin-type"]&&(r[pluginTitleToKey(t)]=!0,a++)}),r.plugin_count=a,s(PLUGIN_ID,"startup",r);i=$tw.rootWidget;let e=!1;const l=()=>{e=!0},o=(i.addEventListener("tm-new-tiddler",()=>{l(),s(PLUGIN_ID,"tiddler_created",{})}),i.addEventListener("tm-save-tiddler",()=>{l(),s(PLUGIN_ID,"tiddler_saved",{})}),i.addEventListener("tm-delete-tiddler",()=>{l(),s(PLUGIN_ID,"tiddler_deleted",{})}),i.addEventListener("tm-perform-search",()=>{l(),s(PLUGIN_ID,"search_performed",{})}),new Set),n=e=>{o.has(e)||(o.add(e),l(),s(PLUGIN_ID,"feature_used",{feature:e}))};$tw.wiki.addEventListener("change",e=>{var t;void 0!==e["$:/layout"]&&(t=(t=$tw.wiki.getTiddlerText("$:/layout",""))?layoutToPluginKey(t):"default",l(),s(PLUGIN_ID,"layout_used",{layout_plugin:t})),void 0!==e["$:/plugins/linonetwo/commandpalette/open"]&&n("command_palette");for(const a of Object.keys(e))if(a.startsWith("$:/state/linonetwo/tw-calendar")||a.startsWith("$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-calendar/config")){n("calendar");break}for(const i of Object.keys(e))if("application/x-tiddler-whiteboard"===$tw.wiki.getTiddler(i)?.fields.type){n("whiteboard");break}for(const r of Object.keys(e))if(r.startsWith("$:/plugins/kookma/todolist")&&!r.includes("/config")){n("todolist");break}for(const o of Object.keys(e))if(o.startsWith("$:/config/kookma/favorites")){n("favorites");break}});let t=0;setInterval(()=>{e&&(e=!1,t++,s(PLUGIN_ID,"active",{beat:t}))},60*HEARTBEAT_MINUTES*1e3)}};"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/default-template-usage-analytics/stats.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/default-template-usage-analytics/stats.js","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"startup","Modern.TiddlyDev#Origin":"stats.ts","text":""use strict";var PLUGIN_ID="default-template-usage-analytics",MIN_DELAY_MS=48e4,MAX_DELAY_MS=72e4,computeStats=()=>{const a=[];let n=0;if($tw.wiki.each((t,e)=>{var s;e.startsWith("$:/plugins/")&&"plugin"===t.fields["plugin-type"]?n++:e.startsWith("$:/")||t.fields["draft.of"]||(s="string"==typeof t.fields.text?t.fields.text:"",a.push(s.length))}),0===a.length)return{user_tiddler_count:0,size_total_chars:0,size_mean_chars:0,size_median_chars:0,size_max_chars:0,size_top10_mean:0,plugin_count:n};a.sort((t,e)=>e-t);var t=a.reduce((t,e)=>t+e,0),e=Math.round(t/a.length),s=a.length%2==0?Math.round((a[a.length/2-1]+a[a.length/2])/2):a[Math.floor(a.length/2)],r=a.slice(0,Math.min(10,a.length)),r=Math.round(r.reduce((t,e)=>t+e,0)/r.length);return{user_tiddler_count:a.length,size_total_chars:t,size_mean_chars:e,size_median_chars:s,size_max_chars:a[0],size_top10_mean:r,plugin_count:n}};exports.name="default-template-usage-analytics-stats",exports.platforms=["node"],exports.after=["startup"],exports.synchronous=!0,exports.startup=()=>{var t=$tw.tidgi?.service?.analytics;if(t?.trackPluginEvent){const e=t.trackPluginEvent.bind(t);t=MIN_DELAY_MS+Math.random()*(MAX_DELAY_MS-MIN_DELAY_MS);setTimeout(()=>{var t=computeStats();e(PLUGIN_ID,"wiki_stats",t)},t)}};"}}}
